parents.subject: LU-10094 mdc: dir page ldp_hash_end mistakenly adjusted

commit.subject: LU-00000 tests: test RHEL 7.7
commit.message:
LU-00000 tests: test RHEL 7.7

This is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly fstype=ldiskfs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientdistro=el7.7 serverdistro=el7.7 \
testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: fortestonly fstype=ldiskfs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientdistro=el7.7 serverdistro=el7.7 \
testgroup=full

Test-Parameters: fortestonly fstype=zfs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientdistro=el7.7 serverdistro=el7.7 \
testgroup=full

Change-Id: I49f61647d0e8f6a9fab663f30f3102d39f15d1ec
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
